MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents a single item available on the restaurant's menu, such as a dish or a drink.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MenuItem entity.

name.description: The name of the menu item (e.g., 'Patatas bravas', 'Cerveza').

category.description: The category to which the menu item belongs (e.g., 'Tapas', 'Montaditos', 'Raciones', 'Bebidas').

price.description: The price of the menu item in local currency (e.g., Euros).

description.description: A brief description of the menu item, detailing its ingredients or characteristics.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the menu item.

GalleryItem.title: GalleryItem
GalleryItem.description: Represents an image in the restaurant's gallery.

Reservation.title: Reservation
Reservation.description: Stores details for a customer's table reservation at the restaurant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reservation entity.

customerName.description: The full name of the customer making the reservation.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the customer.

reservationDate.description: The specific date for which the reservation is made.

reservationTime.description: The specific time of the reservation.

numberOfPeople.description: The total number of people included in the reservation.

message.description: An optional message or special request from the customer regarding the reservation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the reservation record was created.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Captures customer feedback, including a rating and a written comment about their experience.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

customerName.description: The name of the customer who submitted the review.

rating.description: The numerical rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comment.description: The textual feedback or comment provided by the customer.

reviewDate.description: The date and time when the review was submitted.

Suggestion.title: Suggestion
Suggestion.description: Records suggestions or general feedback submitted by users via the contact form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Suggestion entity.

customerName.description: The name of the customer submitting the suggestion (optional).

email.description: The email address of the customer submitting the suggestion (optional).

suggestionText.description: The detailed content of the suggestion or feedback message.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the suggestion was submitted.

definition.description: Stores individual menu items of the restaurant.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific menu item.

definition.description: Stores images for the restaurant gallery.

params.name: galleryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific gallery image.

params.name: reservationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific reservation.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific customer review.

params.name: suggestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific customer suggestion.

firestore.reasoning: Standard flat collection model for high performance and authorization independence.
